title: Using Teams in Filters
excerpt: When will we be able to filter by Teams.  Seems like a simple addition to the filter selecton screen. Teams are exposed everywhere except there it seems.

posts.author: seandotson (Sean Dotson)
posts.cookedHtml:
When will we be able to filter by Teams. Seems like a simple addition to the filter selecton screen. Teams are exposed everywhere except there it seems.

image1406×880 91.1 KB

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Sean! Thanks for this feature suggestion. We’re happy to share with it our team for future product discussions.

As a workaround in the meantime, if you’re looking to filter a board by a Team, we suggest using the quick or advance filters option:

Screenshot 2024-07-09 at 2.21.35 PM1111×485 56.7 KB
